data.title: Bitcoin futures open interest increases by 13% as risk appetite cautiously returns; recovery seen after Q4 deleveraging.
data.description: The open interest for Bitcoin futures has started to rise in January following a significant deleveraging in Q4. Despite this recovery, analysts believe the increase is still moderate.

data.title: GCL SI partners with Ocean Sun for a floating solar project at Soneva Secret resort in Maldives, utilizing over 4,200 TOPCon modules.
data.description: In Suzhou, China on January 19, 2026, GCL System Integration (GCL SI) disclosed the achievement of their collaborative floating solar energy endeavor with Ocean Sun for the Soneva Secret resort in Maldives. The project boasts over 4,200 TOPCon solar panels, showcasing their successful initiative in renewable energy development.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH price may reach $720-750, short-term target $607-624, with critical support at $568.
data.description: Summary of Bitcoin Cash (BCH) Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), the price is expected to reach between $607 and $624. Looking further ahead to the medium term (1 month), forecasts put the price in the $720-$750 range. A bullish breakout level is identified at $625, while critical support is seen at $568. These projections suggest potential fluctuations in BCH value, with a focus on key price levels for investors to monitor.
Japan CRA Official Honjo: Food Sales Tax Cut Feasible Within Six Months of Enactment

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) trades at $2.37, showing a 5.6% decline. Potential recovery to $2.75 by month-end as RSI stabilizes.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $2.37, experiencing a 5.6% decrease. Despite this decline, technical indicators predict a possible rebound to $2.75 in the coming weeks. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is showing stabilization in neutral territory, indicating a potential recovery for ATOM.
Poland’s Tyrowicz Sees Limited Scope for Rate Reductions

data.title: LTC price may reach $75-80 by February 2026 with short-term target at $75-78 and medium-term forecast in $80-87 range.
data.description: Summary of LTC Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), LTC is expected to reach $75-78. Over the medium term (1 month), the forecast is in the $80-87 range. The bullish breakout level is set at $80.79, while critical support is at $65.04.
M5.1 earthquake hits Tonga

data.title: TRX trading at $0.32 may hit $0.35 target as RSI overbought at 71.41. Analysts see $0.32-$0.35 potential despite resistance.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRON (TRX) is currently priced at $0.32, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 71.41 indicating overbought conditions. Analysts predict a trading range of $0.32 to $0.35 based on technical analysis, though there is a risk of a short-term pullback due to resistance levels.

data.title: Tri-Union Seafoods warns consumers of more recalled Genova Tuna due to distribution error from Feb. 2025, at limited retailers.
data.description: Tri-Union Seafoods, based in El Segundo, Calif., issued a warning to customers on Jan. 16, 2026, regarding a third-party distributor's mistake in releasing previously quarantined products linked to a recall from February 2025. The recall was initiated voluntarily after being informed about issues concerning our products.

data.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust's Managing Director retires on Jan 30, 2026. Interim director appointed.
data.description: Keene, New Hampshire - On January 16, 2026, Mr. John R. Van Kirk, Managing Director of North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE: NRT), announced his retirement effective January 30, 2026. The Trust oversees oil royalties and operates within the financial sector. This transition marks a significant change for the company, which manages investments related to oil revenue. With Mr. Van Kirk stepping down, the Trust will undergo restructuring to fill the vacancy left by his departure. The retirement of a key figure like Mr. Van Kirk may impact the performance and direction of the Trust, which holds a notable position in the market with its stock listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NRT.
StandardAero Set to Join S&P MidCap 400

data.title: Lightera introduced a program integrating fiber-optic temperature sensing for safer medical procedures. Booths at BiOS and Photonics West display the innovation.
data.description: Today, in San Francisco, Lightera, a prominent provider of specialized optical fiber solutions, unveiled a new initiative at BiOS, Hall D Booth #8430, and Photonics West Hall F Booth #4505. This program integrates real-time temperature sensing using fiber optics. This innovation aims to revolutionize temperature monitoring and facilitate advanced applications.

data.title: 2026 China FIC Innovation and Collaboration Summit at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco showcased Chinese pharmaceutical company achievements.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, during the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco, the 2026 China FIC Innovation & Collaboration Summit took place. The event, hosted by the ZFIC Alliance, convened key Chinese figures in the US city.

data.title: Lightera launches DataSens™ DryBlock Cable at SPIE Photonics West 2026, promising advanced infrastructure monitoring with easy installation.
data.description: Lightera unveiled their latest product, the DataSens™ DryBlock Cable, at SPIE Photonics West 2026 in San Francisco. Specifically showcased at Booth 4505, this innovative solution is tailored to enhance distributed sensing for business partners. The product is designed to simplify installation processes while boosting sensing capabilities. The unveiling took place on January 16, 2026, at a notable industry event.

data.title: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. to release Q4 2025 financial results on Jan. 28 at 1:15 pm PST, with earnings call at 2:00 pm PST.
data.description: An announcement was made by GBank Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GBFH), the parent company of GBank, that it will disclose its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, at around 1:15 p.m. PST. The quarterly earnings call is scheduled for the same day at 2:00 p.m. PST, accessible for remote participation via the internet. It is important to note that there will be no in-person attendance allowed for this event.

data.title: F.A.A. advises caution over Latin American oceans, warns of military activity. 7 advisories issued regarding parts of Pacific near Mexico, Colombia, Ecuador, and Panama.
data.description: The Federal Aviation Administration issued a total of seven advisories cautioning pilots to avoid specific areas of the Pacific Ocean in close proximity to Mexico, Colombia, Ecuador, and Panama. These advisories were released to ensure the safety of aircraft operations in those regions.

data.title: Saks Global receives $1.75 billion financing package to support operations across stores and online.
data.description: Saks Fifth Avenue, Neiman Marcus, Bergdorf Goodman, and Saks OFF 5TH are currently functioning through both physical stores and online platforms. They are ensuring the continuation of their customer programs and policies. In efforts to support brand partners, payments are being processed promptly, and inventory movement is being expedited. This update was announced on January 16, 2026, from New York.

data.title: Bitcoin at $95,000, other cryptos dip after Senate postpones bill; 93,705 traders liquidated for $181.70M.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently valued at approximately $95,000, with the cryptocurrency market staying cautious after the Senate delayed discussion on a bill regarding crypto market regulations. Other notable cryptocurrency prices include Ethereum at $3,292, Solana at $144.87, XRP at $2.07, Dogecoin at $0.1365, and Shiba Inu at $0.058292. Coinglass data reveals that within the last day, 93,705 traders faced liquidation, resulting in losses totaling $181.70 million. More insights on this development can be found on Benzinga.com.
DBV Tech raises €166.7M in gross proceeds with full exercise of ABSA and BS warrants from March 2025 financing.
